kw: ampel traffic light rot gelb grun sequence
en: Sequence: red → red+amber → green → amber → red.
de: Reihenfolge: rot → rot+gelb → grün → gelb → rot.
tipEn: Red+amber = get ready, do NOT go yet.
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="28" y="10" width="24" height="60" rx="6" fill="#222"/><circle cx="40" cy="24" r="7" fill="#e22"/><circle cx="40" cy="40" r="7" fill="#f5b50a"/><circle cx="40" cy="56" r="7" fill="#2ecc71"/></svg>
ar: Sequence: red → red+amber → green → amber → red.
tipAr: Red+amber = get ready, do NOT go yet.

kw: grunpfeil green arrow right on red
en: Green arrow plate: may turn right on red after a full stop.
de: Grünpfeil-Schild: bei Rot nach Halt rechts abbiegen erlaubt.
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="16" y="22" width="48" height="36" rx="4" fill="#111"/><path d="M30 40 H46 M46 40 l-2 0 M44 32 l10 8 -10 8z M30 36 v8" stroke="#2ecc71" stroke-width="4" fill="#2ecc71"/></svg>
ar: Green arrow plate: may turn right on red after a full stop.

en: Arms spread = stop for those facing chest/back; arm raised = all stop (like amber).
de: Arme seitlich = Halt für Brust/Rücken; Arm hoch = alle halten (wie Gelb).
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><circle cx="40" cy="22" r="7" fill="#111"/><rect x="34" y="30" width="12" height="22" rx="3" fill="#111"/><path d="M34 34 H18 M46 34 L58 24" stroke="#111" stroke-width="5"/></svg>
ar: Arms spread = stop for those facing chest/back; arm raised = all stop (like amber).

kw: durchgezogene linie solid line no crossing
en: Must not cross or straddle it.
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="14" y="14" width="52" height="52" rx="6" fill="#5b6675"/><line x1="40" y1="16" x2="40" y2="64" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="5"/></svg>
ar: Must not cross or straddle it.

en: May cross when the road ahead is clear.
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="14" y="14" width="52" height="52" rx="6" fill="#5b6675"/><line x1="40" y1="16" x2="40" y2="64" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="5" stroke-dasharray="9 8"/></svg>
ar: May cross when the road ahead is clear.

en: No stopping or parking on it.
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="14" y="14" width="52" height="52" rx="6" fill="#5b6675"/><path d="M30 18 L50 30 L30 42 L50 54 L30 64" fill="none" stroke="#f4d000" stroke-width="4"/></svg>
ar: No stopping or parking on it.

en: Stop before this thick white line (STOP, red light).
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="14" y="14" width="52" height="52" rx="6" fill="#5b6675"/><rect x="20" y="36" width="40" height="8" fill="#fff"/></svg>
ar: Stop before this thick white line (STOP, red light).

kw: wartelinie give way line dreiecke haifischzahne
en: White triangles = where to wait when yielding.
de: Weiße Dreiecke = hier warten beim Vorfahrt gewähren.
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="14" y="14" width="52" height="52" rx="6" fill="#5b6675"/><path d="M20 36 l6 8 6 -8z M34 36 l6 8 6 -8z M48 36 l6 8 6 -8z" fill="#fff"/></svg>
ar: White triangles = where to wait when yielding.

en: Forbidden surface — never drive, stop or park on it.
de: Gesperrte Fläche — nie befahren, halten oder parken.
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="14" y="14" width="52" height="52" rx="6" fill="#5b6675"/><path d="M20 60 L60 20 M20 46 L46 20 M34 60 L60 34" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M18 22 v36 l4 0 M62 22 v36" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="3"/></svg>
ar: Forbidden surface — never drive, stop or park on it.

en: In that lane you must follow the arrow direction.
de: In dieser Spur musst du der Pfeilrichtung folgen.
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="14" y="14" width="52" height="52" rx="6" fill="#5b6675"/><path d="M30 60 V32 M30 32 l-5 7 m5 -7 l5 7" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/><path d="M50 60 V42 q0 -8 8 -8 M58 34 l-7 -3 m7 3 l-3 7" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/></svg>
ar: In that lane you must follow the arrow direction.

kw: rot gelb ampel rotgelb red amber
en: Green is coming — get ready, but do not move yet.
de: Gleich Grün — bereitmachen, aber noch nicht fahren.
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="28" y="10" width="24" height="60" rx="6" fill="#222"/><circle cx="40" cy="24" r="7" fill="#e22"/><circle cx="40" cy="40" r="7" fill="#f5b50a"/><circle cx="40" cy="56" r="7" fill="#333"/></svg>
ar: Green is coming — get ready, but do not move yet.

en: Steady amber: stop if you safely can. Flashing: caution, signs apply.
de: Gelb: anhalten, wenn sicher möglich. Blinken: Vorsicht, Schilder gelten.
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="28" y="10" width="24" height="60" rx="6" fill="#222"/><circle cx="40" cy="24" r="7" fill="#333"/><circle cx="40" cy="40" r="7" fill="#f5b50a"/><circle cx="40" cy="56" r="7" fill="#333"/></svg>
ar: Steady amber: stop if you safely can. Flashing: caution, signs apply.

kw: dauerlichtzeichen lane signals rotes kreuz gruner pfeil
en: Red ✕ = lane closed; green ↓ = lane open (motorways, tunnels).
de: Rotes ✕ = Spur gesperrt; grüner ↓ = frei (Autobahn, Tunnel).
drawn: <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80"><rect x="10" y="22" width="28" height="22" rx="3" fill="#111"/><path d="M17 27 L31 39 M31 27 L17 39" stroke="#e22" stroke-width="4"/><rect x="42" y="22" width="28" height="22" rx="3" fill="#111"/><path d="M56 26 v12 M56 38 l-5 -6 m5 6 l5 -6" stroke="#2ecc71" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/></svg>
ar: Red ✕ = lane closed; green ↓ = lane open (motorways, tunnels).
